ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emission_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission category */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector for the emission category (e.g., energy, agriculture) */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector for the emission category (e.g., electricity generation, rice cultivation) */,
  "gas_type" TEXT /* Type of greenhouse gas (e.g., CO2, CH4, N2O) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year name */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_data" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission data entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission category */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "emission_value" REAL /* Emission value in Gg of CO2 eq */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the emission value (e.g., 10%, 20%) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the emission value (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES emission_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mitigation_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mitigation measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the mitigation measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mitigation measure */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission category the measure is targeting */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the measure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the measure */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Implementation status of the measure (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigation_measures_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES emission_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mitigation_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effectiveness entry */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mitigation measure */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "reduction_value" REAL /* Reduction value in Gg of CO2 eq */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the reduction value (e.g., 10%, 20%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigation_effectiveness_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES mitigation_measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigation_effectiveness_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry clerk, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to (e.g., government, NGO, private sector) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource (e.g., emission_id, measure_id) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., emission data, mitigation measure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES emission_data ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES mitigation_measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., emission trends, mitigation effectiveness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission factor */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity for which the emission factor applies (e.g., electricity generation, fuel combustion) */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the emission factor (e.g., kg CO2/MWh, kg CO2/L) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_data" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity data entry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector for which the activity data applies (e.g., energy, agriculture) */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity for which the data applies (e.g., electricity generation, fuel combustion) */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "activity_value" REAL /* Activity value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the activity value (e.g., MWh, L) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
